case_title: CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU vs. HEAGNEY, MARTIN ALOYSIUS

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT HEAGNEY, MARTIN ALOYSIUS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEAGNEY, MARTIN ALOYSIUS $4,394.56 PRINCIPAL, $3,644.33 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,061.89, THIS IS A RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #052428. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU SERVED JUN-21-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT HEAGNEY, MARTIN ALOYSIUS
ORIGINAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT HEAGNEY, MARTIN ALOYSIUS
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY A COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 7/29/03 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT, NOTICE OF RENEWED JUDGMENT, ISSUED; FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU
